 I would like to suggest instead the attached patch, which is a bit
 easier to maintain, cleans out some obsolete variables and a faulty
 sed command in the port Makefile, and works for more choices of tcl
 (in particular, threaded tcl).
 
 Regards,
                b.
 
 --001485f89ee84502f3046e19ad96
